hero.headline: Spaces that think.
hero.subline: Architecture and market intelligence for projects that respond to the territory with data, intuition, and care.

left.title: Projects that respond to the territory
left.body: From concept to construction detail: feasibility studies, executive design, parametric façades, retrofit and interiors.

right.title: Data that becomes decision
right.body: Power BI dashboards, densification studies, absorption and sales velocity analysis, demographic and competitive mapping.

featured.title: Recent work
featured.description: A curation of what best represents both sides of the practice.

dataInsights.title: From floor plan to dashboard.
dataInsights.body: Every launch is also a data point. I map what's being built in São José dos Campos and São Paulo — by zone, bedrooms, area, and builder — and turn that into decisions for developers, funds, and architects.

about.title: Fernando Diogo
about.body: Architect and real estate market analyst working at the intersection of architectural design and city-reading through data. He operates at the frontier of built form and urban dynamics — where the building must respond to the territory.

testimonials.quote: The rare combination of architectural sensibility and analytical market reading.
testimonials.author: Maria Santos

contactCta.title: Let's build the next project.
contactCta.subtitle: Architecture, market consulting, or both — write to me.
